notes: This is a launch-planning dataset, not an authoritative boundary dataset.
All coordinates are provisional settlement centroids and must not be used to infer a private business address.
Welsh names and aliases should receive a final human language review before public launch.
Coverage states intentionally concentrate early seeding in the Rhondda.

places.source: Initial public-source research; coordinates are approximate settlement centroids and require authoritative review before boundary-sensitive use.
